items.title: Suffering was less than my passion for tennis, says Nadal
items.summary: In a new Netflix documentary, 22-time Grand Slam winner Rafael Nadal opened up about the extreme lengths he went to to prolong his playing career, including surgery to take away feeling in his foot and perforating his intestine through over-use of anti-inflammatories.

items.title: Godišnjica stravične tragedije: Igraju, a mrtvi su pored terena
items.summary: Prošla je točno 41 godina od jednog od najvećih užasa u povijesti sporta, tragedije na belgijskom Heyselu. Juventus i Liverpool igrali su za prvaka Europe. Krvavi ples engleskih huligana... Poginulo je 39 ljudi
